templates.title: Example manual task: {topic}
templates.description: TODO: the brief for this task. {topic} is a placeholder the co-founder fills in when dispatching. A template with no `recurrence` is a manual template — the co-founder dispatches it on demand.

templates.title: Example recurring task
templates.description: TODO: the brief for this task. A template with `recurrence` (daily or weekly) and an optional `time` ("HH:MM TZ") is synthesized into a native cron at install — this one runs weekly at 09:00 PT.
